color.quote: The leaves are predominantly green with scattered small yellow-brown to tan flecks and larger reddish-brown necrotic patches, especially on the rightmost leaf.

shape.value: small angular to irregular flecks coalescing into larger irregular necrotic blotches
shape.quote: Lesions appear as small angular to irregular pinpoint flecks scattered across the laminae that coalesce into larger irregular necrotic blotches and tattered holes on the more advanced leaves.

margin.value: indistinct, diffuse with faint chlorotic halo
margin.quote: Lesion margins are mostly indistinct and diffuse, with a faint chlorotic yellowing bordering the larger brown necrotic areas.

texture.quote: The leaves show a puckered, crinkled surface with dry papery necrotic patches and several torn-out (shot-hole) areas where dead tissue has fallen away.

color.quote: Foliage shows a patchy mottle of light green to yellow-green areas interspersed with normal dark green tissue, producing a mosaic appearance across multiple trifoliate leaves.

shape.quote: The discoloration forms irregular, diffuse blotches and patches scattered between the veins rather than discrete circular lesions.

margin.quote: Margins of the chlorotic patches are indistinct and gradually blend into surrounding green tissue with no sharp border or halo.

texture.quote: Affected leaflets appear mottled with subtle puckering or uneven surface between veins, while a few small holes from chewing damage are also visible but not part of the viral symptom.

color.quote: Numerous small dark reddish-brown to nearly black lesions are scattered across the green leaf, many surrounded by diffuse yellow chlorotic halos.

shape.value: small angular to irregular spots, some coalescing into larger blotches
shape.quote: The lesions are small angular to irregular flecks, with several merging into larger ragged blotches and a few holes where necrotic tissue has dropped out.

margin.value: sharp dark brown border with diffuse yellow chlorotic halo
margin.quote: Lesion edges are sharply defined dark brown borders surrounded by diffuse yellow chlorotic halos that fade gradually into healthy green tissue.

texture.quote: Lesion centers appear dry and necrotic, with several spots torn out leaving shot-hole gaps in the leaf blade; no fungal sporulation or fuzzy growth is visible.

color.quote: Lesions appear as pale tan to light brown spots with slightly greyish necrotic centers, set against green leaf tissue with faint yellowish chlorotic mottling around them.

shape.value: irregular, somewhat angular spots of varying size, occasionally bounded by minor veins
shape.quote: The spots are irregular and somewhat angular in outline, scattered across the leaflets in varying sizes and sometimes constrained by small veins.

margin.value: diffuse, fading gradually into a faint yellow chlorotic halo
margin.quote: Lesion margins are diffuse rather than sharp, blending into the surrounding green tissue through a faint yellow chlorotic halo.

value: no visible sporulation on this upper surface
texture.quote: Necrotic centers look dry and papery, with a few lesions having torn out to leave small shot-holes; no downy sporulation is visible from this upper-surface view.

color.quote: Numerous small spots with pale tan-to-gray centers ringed by reddish-brown to dark purple-brown borders set against still-green leaf tissue.

shape.value: small circular to subcircular spots, mostly 1-3 mm, scattered densely across the lamina
shape.quote: The lesions are small, roughly circular to slightly irregular spots distributed densely and uniformly over the entire upper leaf surface.

margin.value: sharply delimited narrow dark reddish-brown to purplish border
margin.quote: Each spot is bounded by a thin, sharply defined reddish-brown to purplish ring that clearly separates the necrotic center from surrounding green tissue.

value: some centers dropped out producing shot-hole appearance
texture.quote: Lesion centers look thin, dry and papery, and several have fallen out leaving small shot-holes; no fuzzy sporulation is visible in this photograph.

color.quote: The underside of the leaf is densely peppered with small tan to rust-orange pustules against a pale green background, with a few darker brown necrotic flecks interspersed.

shape.quote: Lesions appear as numerous tiny pinpoint to slightly angular raised pustules, individually small but covering most of the abaxial leaf surface.

margin.quote: Individual pustules have diffuse, indistinct margins that blend into the surrounding leaf tissue rather than forming sharply bordered spots.

texture.quote: The leaf underside shows a granular, powdery texture from densely clustered raised uredinial pustules releasing rust-colored spore masses.

color.quote: The lower stem shows a bleached cream-to-tan discoloration with light brown necrotic patches at the crown, contrasting with the darker brown of the surrounding stem and soil-coated roots.

shape.value: elongated, girdling lesion at the crown extending vertically up the lower stem
shape.quote: An irregular elongated bleached lesion runs vertically along the lower stem and wraps around the crown region just above the soil line.

margin.quote: The boundary between the bleached tan lesion and the surrounding healthier stem tissue is diffuse and irregular rather than sharply defined.

texture.quote: The affected lower stem surface appears dry, papery, and weathered, with no clearly visible white mycelial fan or distinct round sclerotia in this view.
